description: This map displays an example Natura 2000 (N2K) site, along with a 2 km buffer zone, situated within a broader European landscape. The background is Very High Resolution (VHR) satellite imagery, likely in false colour infrared, showing dark green and maroon forested areas, light red and pink agricultural fields, and light blue/cyan urban and bare soil areas. A prominent blue outline demarcates the boundary of the Natura 2000 site combined with its 2 km buffer. Within this boundary, numerous irregularly shaped polygons are highlighted with a green outline. These green-outlined areas represent specific Land Cover / Land Use (LCLU) features, delineated based on visual image interpretation. The map includes a scale bar indicating 1:50.000, with segments for 0, 1, and 2 km, and a north arrow pointing upwards.
